# Eden Communications
# Last updated: 2026-03-17

> Strategic PR & Communications for Crypto, Fintech & Frontier Tech

Eden Communications is a strategic public relations firm specializing in
cryptocurrency, fintech, and frontier technology companies. Founded by
Ebony Lewkovitz, former Washington correspondent for the New York Post.
Headquartered in New York City at 600 Lexington Avenue.

## Services
- Strategic Counsel & Narrative Development: Crafting positioning, messaging frameworks, and go-to-market communications strategies for crypto and fintech companies seeking institutional credibility.
- Earned Media Relations: Securing coverage in top-tier financial and technology outlets including Bloomberg, CNBC, Reuters, Fortune, Forbes, and the Wall Street Journal through journalist relationships and newsroom expertise.
- Executive Visibility & Stakeholder Engagement: Building public profiles for founders and executives through speaking engagements, thought leadership, and interview preparation for broadcast and print media.
- AI-Powered Media & Market Intelligence: Proprietary daily briefings, competitive monitoring, and real-time media analysis using AI-driven tools to inform PR strategy and identify earned media opportunities.

## Team
- Ebony Lewkovitz, Founder — Former Washington correspondent for the New York Post and ABC News journalist. https://www.linkedin.com/in/ebonylew/
- Larissa Bundziak, Director — https://www.linkedin.com/in/larissabundziak/
- Gabrielle Gomez, Managing Account Supervisor — https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriellegomez/

## Case Studies
- Ondo Finance: Earned media strategy for the leading tokenized real-world assets protocol. 450+ media placements across Bloomberg, CNBC, Reuters, Fortune, and more. 61% share of voice lead in tokenized securities. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/ondo
- Stellar Development Foundation: Strategic communications for the open-source payments network. 632M+ audience reach across tier-1 financial outlets. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/stellar-development-foundation
- Grip Shipping: PR launch strategy for the AI-powered freight logistics platform. 4,050% increase in press coverage within six months. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/grip-shipping
- Reed Smith On-Chain: Thought leadership positioning for the global law firm's blockchain practice. 48 earned placements and 467M audience reach. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/reed-smith-on-chain
- Franzy: Media relations for the franchise discovery marketplace. 4,300% platform sign-up increase and 22 media placements. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/franzy
- Blue Planet Energy: Communications strategy for the renewable energy storage company. 1,898% increase in landing page traffic. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/blue-planet-energy
- Henk Rogers: Personal brand and climate advocacy platform for the co-founder of Tetris. 28.5M+ impressions from NPR How I Built This and global media. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/henk-rogers
